title: The Quran Said Iron Came From the Sky. Science Just Caught Up.

sound.ambient: deep space cosmic ambience, low airy hum, vast and clean, subtle shimmer, no music, no melody, no instruments

_note: Quran-science miracle, modern fast-cut style. New scene almost every line. No recitation = copyright-free. No em dashes. Voice: George (deep British). Short app ad at the end.

segments.text: The Quran said something about iron… that took science fourteen hundred years to understand.
segments.caption: Iron · Quran 57:25

segments.text: It said iron was sent down.
segments.caption: "We sent down iron"

segments.text: For centuries, that made no sense.
segments.caption: It made no sense.

segments.text: Iron cannot be created on Earth.
segments.caption: Not made on Earth.

segments.text: It can only be forged… in the heart of a dying star.
segments.caption: Forged in dying stars.

segments.sfx: deep low ominous impact, single hollow boom, dark
segments.caption: Then it explodes.

segments.text: it scatters iron across the universe.
segments.caption: Scattered everywhere.

segments.text: Every atom of iron on Earth… fell from the sky.
segments.caption: Stellar nucleosynthesis

segments.text: Even the iron in your blood… is stardust.
segments.caption: You are stardust.

segments.text: Sent down. Exactly as He said… fourteen hundred years ago.
segments.caption: Quran 57:25

segments.text: Want more like this? Get Ketabi, free, at Ketabi Studio dot com.
segments.caption: Download Ketabi.

sources: Quran 57:25 - 'and We sent down iron, in which is great strength'
Stellar nucleosynthesis - iron forms in massive stars; supernovae disperse it; Earth's iron is of cosmic origin
